title: CARS FOR HOMES PROGRAM - 211info
text: GRANTS PASS AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY CARS FOR HOMES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Individuals can support Habitat for Humanity's local and global programs by donating their cars, trucks, boats, RVs, or other vehicles. Proceeds from the sale of the vehicle support Habitat's mission of providing homes for people in need. 409 NE E Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon. Closed federal holidays and for inclement weather. Email - (877) 277-4344 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (877) 277-4344 Cars for Homes Vehicle Donation Program Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Josephine County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Next to Domino's Pizza Services: Vehicle Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - RAMP PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
